title: BEM-599 internal analyst plan
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
base=Path('governance/internal_contour'); base.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
plans=base/'analyst/plans'; plans.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
audit_inbox=base/'auditor/inbox'; audit_inbox.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

task_path=base/'tasks/operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json'
try:
    task=json.loads(task_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if task_path.exists() else {}
except Exception:
    task={}
plan_id='bem599_internal_analyst_decision_format_plan'
plan={
  'schema_version':'internal_analyst_plan.v1',
  'plan_id':plan_id,
  'source_task':str(task_path),
  'decision_id':'bem584_decision_format_live_test',
  'role':'analyst',
  'status':'ready_for_audit',
  'goal':'Apply operator-selected short readable comparison table as canonical operator decision format.',
  'operator_choice':'1',
  'selected_format':'short_readable_comparison_table',
  'implementation_scope':[{
      'item':'Decision package source',
      'path':'governance/operator_decision_queue/*.json',
      'requirement':'Operator decision Telegram must be generated only from structured decision packages.'
    },{
      'item':'Telegram renderer',
      'path':'scripts/operator_decision_pick.py',
      'requirement':'Render BEM header, stage, roadmap, checklist, question, readable comparison table, details, recommendation, reply instruction.'
    },{
      'item':'Routine mailbox',
      'path':'scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py',
      'requirement':'Never notify Telegram for routine Claude↔GPT mailbox messages.'
    },{
      'item':'Decision persistence',
      'path':'governance/operator_decisions/*.json',
      'requirement':'Operator choices must persist as machine-readable JSON.'
    },{
      'item':'Routing',
      'path':'governance/curator/inbox -> governance/role_orchestrator/inbox -> governance/internal_contour',
      'requirement':'Decision must route to curator, role orchestrator, and internal contour without manual relay.'
    }],
  'acceptance_criteria':[ 
    'Canonical protocol exists and states short readable comparison table.',
    'Routine mailbox Telegram is disabled.',
    'Structured decision package renderer exists.',
    'Operator decision JSON exists for bem584_decision_format_live_test.',
    'Curator intake exists for same decision.',
    'Role orchestrator intake exists for same decision.',
    'Internal contour task exists for same decision.',
    'Evidence report and proof files exist.'
  ],
  'risks':[{
      'risk':'Telegram reply intake may still be flaky due HTTP 403 or webhook state.',
      'mitigation':'Keep chat fallback only for explicit operator choice; continue hardening poller/webhook separately.'
    },{
      'risk':'Box-drawing table can still wrap on very narrow screens.',
      'mitigation':'Keep cells short and move long text to details block.'
    }],
  'next_role':'auditor',
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 23:00 (UTC+3)',
  'blocker':None
}
plan_json=plans/(plan_id+'.json')
plan_md=plans/(plan_id+'.md')
plan_json.write_text(json.dumps(plan,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
plan_md.write_text('# BEM-599 | Internal Analyst Plan | Operator Decision Format'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 23:00 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Goal'+sep+plan['goal']+sep+sep+'## Selected format'+sep+'Option 1: short readable comparison table.'+sep+sep+'## Acceptance criteria'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x for x in plan['acceptance_criteria']])+sep+sep+'## Next role'+sep+'Auditor'+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)

audit_pkg=audit_inbox/(plan_id+'.json')
audit_pkg.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'internal_audit_request.v1','request_id':plan_id,'from_role':'analyst','to_role':'auditor','status':'ready_for_audit','plan_file':str(plan_json),'question':'Does the operator decision pipeline satisfy acceptance criteria and avoid routine Telegram noise?','created_at':'2026-05-17 | 23:00 (UTC+3)','blocker':None},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

protocol=protocols/'INTERNAL_ANALYST_OPERATOR_DECISION_FORMAT_PLAN.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-599 | Internal Analyst Operator Decision Format Plan'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 23:00 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Internal analyst plan created for applying operator-selected short readable comparison table format. Plan is sent to internal auditor inbox.'+sep)
report=reports/'bem599_internal_analyst_decision_format_plan.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-599 | Internal Analyst Decision Format Plan | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 23:00 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Analyst plan and audit request created for operator decision format pipeline.'+sep+sep+'## Files'+sep+'- '+str(plan_json)+sep+'- '+str(plan_md)+sep+'- '+str(audit_pkg)+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem599_internal_analyst_decision_format_plan','cycle_id':'bem599-internal-analyst-decision-format-plan','source':'gpt_internal_analyst','status':'completed','plan_file':str(plan_json),'audit_request':str(audit_pkg),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 23:00 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem599_internal_analyst_decision_format_plan']={'status':'completed','plan_file':str(plan_json),'audit_request':str(audit_pkg),'blocker':None}
state['internal_control_stage']='analyst_plan_ready_for_audit'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 23:00 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem599_internal_analyst_decision_format_plan.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-599 PASS: internal analyst plan created and sent to auditor inbox.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(plan_json),str(plan_md),str(audit_pkg),str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created internal analyst plan and audit request for operator decision format pipeline')
"""
